prompts.text: What am I most grateful for today, and why does it matter to me?
Describe a moment today when you felt truly alive. What made it special?
If I could tell my younger self one thing, what would it be?
What fear am I carrying that no longer serves me? What would change if I released it?
Write about someone who changed your life. What did they teach you without knowing it?
What would I do differently if I knew no one would judge me?
List five things your body allows you to do that you often take for granted.
What pattern keeps repeating in my life? What might it be trying to teach me?
Describe the person you want to be one year from now. What daily actions close that gap?
What conversation am I avoiding? What would happen if I had it?
Write about a failure that later became a gift. How did it redirect you?
What does my ideal ordinary day look like — not a vacation, but a regular Tuesday?
If money and time were unlimited, how would I spend my days?
What am I holding onto that I need to forgive — in myself or others?
What three words do I want people to use when describing me? Am I living those words?
Describe a small moment of beauty you noticed today.
What is the bravest thing I've ever done? What did it cost me? What did it give me?
Write a letter to your future self, 10 years from now. What do you hope they know?
What belief about myself do I need to let go of to move forward?
Who in my life deserves more of my attention and presence?
What does rest truly look like for me? Not distraction — real rest.
List everything that is going right in my life right now.
What would I attempt if I knew I could not fail?
Describe a time when saying 'no' to something led to a better 'yes.'
What part of my daily routine drains me? What part fills me up?
If I could master any skill in the world, what would it be and why?
What does my inner critic say most often? How would a loving friend respond to those words?
Describe a moment when you felt completely at peace. What elements were present?
What am I pretending not to know?
Write about something difficult you're going through as if you were advising a dear friend.
What three things would make tomorrow better than today?
How have I grown in the last year? What evidence can I point to?
What does unconditional love look like to me? Do I offer it to myself?
Describe one habit that, if I started today, would change my life in a year.
What does my body need right now that I've been ignoring?
What story do I keep telling about my past? Is it the only version? Is it still true?
If today were my last day, what would I want the people I love to know?
What am I learning right now — intentionally or unintentionally?
Write about a time when you surprised yourself with your own strength.
What does my life look like when I'm operating from love instead of fear?
Name three people who make the world better just by being in it. Why?
What does success mean to ME — not my parents, not society, not social media — just me?
What emotion have I been avoiding this week? What is it trying to tell me?
If I wrote the title of my current life chapter, what would it be?
What is the kindest thing someone has ever done for me?
What would I do more of if I stopped worrying about being perfect?
Write about a place where you feel completely yourself.
What boundary do I need to set? What makes it difficult?
If I could solve one problem in the world, what would it be and why does it call to me?
What have I been postponing that my soul is ready for?
Write about a mistake that taught you more than any success.
What does it mean to be truly present? When did I last experience it?
How would my life change if I spent the first hour of each day without screens?
Write a thank-you note to your past self for a decision that paid off.
What does forgiveness mean to me? Is there something I'm ready to forgive?
Describe the most meaningful conversation you've ever had.
What am I making harder than it needs to be?
If I listened to my intuition more, what would change?
What does courage look like in my life right now?
Write about a simple pleasure that brings you consistent joy.

categories.name: Gratitude
categories.description: Cultivate appreciation for what's already here

categories.name: Self-Awareness
categories.description: Notice what's happening within and around you

categories.name: Deep Reflection
categories.description: Look back to move forward with clarity

categories.name: Personal Growth
categories.description: Explore your edges and expand your potential

categories.name: Future Vision
categories.description: Design the life you want to create

categories.name: Courage & Fear
categories.description: Face what frightens you and discover what's on the other side

categories.name: Healing
categories.description: Tend to the wounds that need your attention

categories.name: Authenticity
categories.description: Uncover who you really are beneath the masks

categories.name: Purpose & Meaning
categories.description: Explore what gives your life direction

categories.name: Mind-Body
categories.description: Listen to the wisdom of your body

categories.name: Boundaries
categories.description: Honor your limits and protect your energy

categories.name: Self-Compassion
categories.description: Treat yourself with the kindness you deserve
